---
title: "WebAssembly Lotka-Volterra (Fast Base-R)"
format: html
filters:
  - shinylive
---

```{shinylive-r}
#| standalone: true
#| viewerHeight: 600
library(shiny)

# 1. Reine R-Logik (Kein tidyverse, kein ggplot2, kein plotly!)
rk4_pure <- function(y, times, func, parms) {
  out <- matrix(NA, nrow = length(times), ncol = length(y) + 1)
  out[1, ] <- c(times[1], y)
  colnames(out) <- c("time", names(y))
  current_y <- y
  for (i in 1:(length(times) - 1)) {
    t_curr <- times[i]
    t_next <- times[i + 1]
    h <- t_next - t_curr
    k1 <- unlist(func(t_curr,          current_y,          parms))
    k2 <- unlist(func(t_curr + h / 2,  current_y + h * k1 / 2, parms))
    k3 <- unlist(func(t_curr + h / 2,  current_y + h * k2 / 2, parms))
    k4 <- unlist(func(t_next,          current_y + h * k3,     parms))
    current_y <- current_y + (h / 6) * (k1 + 2 * k2 + 2 * k3 + k4)
    out[i + 1, ] <- c(t_next, current_y)
  }
  return(as.data.frame(out))
}

lv <- function (t, x, parms) {
  with(as.list(c(x, parms)),{
    dB <- a * B - b * R * B
    dR <- c * R * B - d * R
    list(c(dB, dR))
  })
}

ui <- fluidPage(
  titlePanel("Lotka-Volterra (Schnelle Base-R Version)"),
  sidebarLayout(
    sidebarPanel(
      numericInput("lv_B0", "B0: Beute", value = 1.0, min = 0, max = 2, step = 0.1),
      numericInput("lv_R0", "R0: Räuber", value = 0.5, min = 0, max = 2, step = 0.1),
      hr(),
      sliderInput("lv_a", "a: Vermehrung Beute", value = 0.1, min = 0, max = 1, step = 0.02),
      sliderInput("lv_b", "b: Verlust Beute", value = 0.1, min = 0, max = 1, step = 0.02),
      sliderInput("lv_c", "c: Effizienz Räuber", value = 0.1, min = 0, max = 1, step = 0.02),
      sliderInput("lv_d", "d: Sterberate Räuber", value = 0.1, min = 0, max = 1, step = 0.02)
    ),
    mainPanel(
      plotOutput("lv_plot", height = "500px")
    )
  )
)

server <- function(input, output, session) {
  times <- seq(0, 200, by = .2)
  
  output$lv_plot <- renderPlot({
    parms <- c(a = input$lv_a, b = input$lv_b, c = input$lv_c, d = input$lv_d)
    y0    <- c(B = input$lv_B0, R = input$lv_R0)
    res   <- rk4_pure(y0, times, lv, parms)
    
    # Hochperformantes Zeichnen mit R-Standardgrafik
    plot(res$time, res$B, type = "l", col = "#69af22", lwd = 2,
         ylim = c(0, max(c(res$B, res$R))),
         xlab = "Zeit", ylab = "Abundanz", main = "Populationsdynamik")
    lines(res$time, res$R, col = "#009de0", lwd = 2)
    
    legend("topright", legend = c("Beute", "Räuber"), 
           col = c("#69af22", "#009de0"), lty = 1, lwd = 2, bty = "n")
  })
}

shinyApp(ui = ui, server = server)
```
